structures.name: Campfire
structures.function: Needed for cooking food. It can only be used to grill simple ingredients. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Palbox
structures.capacity: defines base area; base pal slots managed via Palbox (15 base workers by default, expandable via base missions)
structures.function: Facility for storing captured Pals. Pals inside gradually recover Health. Area around this facility becomes a base.

structures.name: Straw Pal Bed
structures.function: A straw bed for Pals. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. It isn't soft, but it's better than nothing.

structures.name: Feed Box
structures.function: A box for storing Pal food. Pals can feed from it when hungry. Make sure to keep it well-stocked to keep your Pals happy.

structures.name: Berry Plantation
structures.function: A farm that can grow Red Berries . Harvest time is quick, but eating them doesn't provide much sustenance. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Ranch
structures.function: Farm for raising sheep and fowl-like Pals. Assign a Pal with the appropriate Partner Skill to a farm to produce items.

structures.name: Monitoring Stand
structures.function: Command your Pals to work on various things inside a base. You can allow or prohibit individual kinds of work.

structures.name: Hot Spring
structures.function: Facility where Pals on base can rest. Restores SAN after a long day of hard work.

structures.name: Statue of Power
structures.function: Stone statue spoken of in legends on Palpagos Island. Offer up Lifmunk Effigy to receive strange powers.

structures.name: Egg Incubator
structures.function: Used for incubating a Pal Egg. If a Pal Egg is left in it, it will automatically hatch after some time has passed.

structures.name: Medieval Medicine Workbench
structures.function: A facility for making Pal medicine. It can only produce simple medicines. Leave its operation to a Pal that can make medicine.

structures.name: Cooler Box
structures.function: Small food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

structures.name: Pal Essence Condenser
structures.function: A chamber for increasing a Pal's rank. Pals can surpass their physical limitations if given a concentrated extract taken from a Pal of the same type.

structures.name: Mill
structures.function: Facility for milling Wheat to produce Flour . Requires Pal with the Watering trait to spin the water turbine.

structures.name: Wheat Plantation
structures.function: A farm that can grow Wheat . It requires an average amount of time to harvest. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest crops.

structures.name: Cooking Pot
structures.function: Needed for cooking food. Use of a cooking pot allows for a wider variety of meal preparation. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Heater
structures.function: A device that blows warm air, raising the temperature of a base. It doesn't provide much warmth, but helps one to endure somewhat cold environments. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Cooler
structures.function: A device that blows cool air, lowering the temperature of a base. It doesn't provide much relief from the heat, but helps one to endure somewhat hot environments. Requires an Ice Pal for cooling.

structures.name: Breeding Farm
structures.workers: any 1 male + 1 female pal pair (not a work suitability)
structures.function: Assign one male and one female Pal to produce eggs. Placing Cake in the facility is required for production.

structures.name: Pal Labor Research Lab
structures.function: A facility for conducting research on the various tasks of Pals. By assigning tasks to Pals in this facility, research progresses, granting various benefits.

structures.name: Tomato Plantation
structures.function: A farm that can grow Tomato . They take time to harvest, but increase the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Pal Expedition Station
structures.function: A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.

structures.name: Clinic
structures.function: A basic medical facility for managing the health of Pals working at the base. Assigning a Pal with Medicine Production suitability helps reduce SAN depletion and prevent illness and injury. While sanitation has its limits, it plays a crucial role in early base development.

structures.name: Fluffy Pal Bed
structures.function: A fluffy bed that Pals can get a good rest on. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. Pals love sleeping on fluffy beds like this.

structures.name: Medicine Rack
structures.function: A shelf for storing medicine. Sick Pals will come here to take their medicine. Be sure to keep the medicine stocked.

structures.name: Lettuce Plantation
structures.function: A farm that can grow Lettuce . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Human-Powered Generator
structures.workers: any pal (converts labor to power, drains SAN)
structures.function: A facility that converts rotational motion into electrical energy. The efficiency is low, and the Pals working here will experience a decrease in SAN value, but they will gain experience points.

structures.name: Power Generator
structures.function: A power generator fueled by Electric Pals. Electric equipment won't run without this.

structures.name: High Quality Monitoring Stand
structures.function: A refined monitoring station with improved materials and structure. In addition to being able to issue work orders, the system also lowers the SAN cost for Pals working at the base. Working conditions are slightly improved, making Pals less likely to become dissatisfied.

structures.name: Potato Plantation
structures.function: A farm where you can grow Potato . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: High Quality Hot Spring
structures.function: Facility where Pals on base can rest. Now comfier and restores more SAN.

structures.name: Carrot Plantation
structures.function: A farm where you can grow Carrot . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Electric Egg Incubator
structures.function: Device for incubating Pal eggs. Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

structures.name: Large Pal Bed
structures.function: A fluffy bed that Pals can get a good rest on. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. Even large Pals can sleep soundly on a bed like this.

structures.name: Onion Plantation
structures.function: A farm where you can grow Onion . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Accumulator
structures.function: A facility for storing excess electricity generated by the Power Generator .

structures.name: Refrigerator
structures.function: Large food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

structures.name: Electric Heater
structures.function: A device that blows warm air, raising the temperature of a base. Using electricity, it can really heat things up. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Electric Kitchen
structures.function: Needed for cooking food. It requires electricity to run, but allows a large amount of meals to be prepared rapidly. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Electric Cooler
structures.function: A device that blows cool air, lowering the temperature of a base. Using electricity, it can really lower the temperature. Requires an Ice Pal for cooling.

structures.name: Electric Medicine Workbench
structures.function: A facility for making Pal medicine. It requires electricity, but can produce high quality medicine. Leave its operation to a Pal that can make medicine.

structures.name: Electric Pylon
structures.function: Place in base to improve electricity generating speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Large Incubator
structures.function: Device for incubating Pal eggs. It automatically maintains a suitable temperature and can hatch multiple eggs at once.

structures.name: Large-Scale Stone Oven
structures.function: Needed for cooking food. By becoming larger, multiple Pals can cooperate to cook together. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Large Power Generator
structures.function: A power generator fueled by Electric Pals. Larger and with improved power generation efficiency.

structures.name: Cold Food Box
structures.function: A feeding box that can be kept cold. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

structures.name: Pal Pod
structures.function: A healing pod for Pals. Used when Pals are injured or to rest at night. Thanks to technological advancements, the healing amount has increased.

structures.name: Large-Scale Electric Egg Incubator
structures.function: Device for incubating Pal eggs. While power supply is required, it allows multiple eggs to be incubated simultaneously at the optimal temperature.

structures.name: Advanced Medicine Workbench
structures.function: A facility for making medicine to cure Pals' illnesses. With advanced technology, it can also create unknown medicines. Assign the task to a Pal capable of pharmacy work.

structures.name: Ancient Kitchen
structures.function: A special kitchen based on ancient technology that can create everything from existing dishes to entirely new recipes. It retains heat through fire and completes cooking with manual preparation, allowing it to prepare any kind of cuisine. It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Handiwork suitability.

worker_req.min_level_note: 6+ со слов игрока (PRELIMINARY); paldb пишет 'high-level' без цифры

structures.name: Ancient Monitoring Stand
structures.function: A monitoring station based on ancient technology, embedded with Red Paldium. It issues commands across the entire base through a holographic interface, reducing SAN depletion in Pals. A special wavelength surrounds the base, keeping Pals calm even in harsh working environments.

structures.name: Skillfruit Orchard
structures.function: A farm where Skillfruits can be cultivated. By planting the original fruit in the ground, multiple fruits of the same type can be harvested.

structures.name: Ancient Clinic
structures.function: A top-tier medical facility that reproduces advanced ancient medical technology. It offers significantly greater protective capability than a standard clinic. By assigning a Pal with Medicine Production suitability, even bases with harsh working conditions can maintain the highest level of hygiene.

structures.name: Ancient Pal Bed
structures.function: A ulitmate Pal Bed made from ancient recovery pod with soft matress. It offers one of the highest SAN recovery rates of all Pal beds, quickly relieving fatigue. It is the same size as a Large Pal Bed, allowing large Pals to rest comfortably.

structures.name: Ancient Power Generator
structures.function: A highly efficient power generator restored from lost ancient technology. It produces massive amounts of electricity, but is prone to overheating while in operation. It requires Pals with high-level Generating Electricity and any level of Watering suitability.

worker_req.min_level_note: 6+ со слов игрока (PRELIMINARY); paldb пишет 'high-level' без цифры

structures.name: Ancient Hatchery
structures.workers: any 1 male + 1 female pal pair (not a work suitability)
structures.function: An advanced breeding facility of ancient civilization technology, enclosed in electronic glass. It fully automates everything from egg production to incubation at high speed, and increases the inheritance rate of rare skills. Pals are managed through holograms, it requires minimal pasture space.

structures.name: Ancient Hot Spring
structures.function: A hot spring built with ancient technology, filled with special water infused with Paldium. It offers the highest SAN recovery of all hot springs and also restores Health. It is the same size as a standard hot spring, and can fully heal injured Pals.

structures.name: Ancient Farm
structures.function: A special cultivation device based on ancient technology that harnesses the power of the World Tree to grow all kinds of plants on Palpagos Island. Smaller than a berry plantation and suitable for indoor placement, it still follows the same cultivation process as standard plots. It requires Pals with high-level Planting, Watering, and Harvesting suitability.

worker_req.min_level_note: 6+ со слов игрока (PRELIMINARY); paldb пишет 'high-level' без цифры

structures.name: Stone Pit
structures.function: Placeable production site: Stone x1 per workload cycle. SAN -0.15/target while working.

structures.name: Ore Mining Site
structures.function: Placeable production site: Ore x1 per workload cycle. SAN -0.15/target while working.

structures.name: Logging Site
structures.function: Placeable production site: Wood x1 per workload cycle. SAN -0.15/target while working.

structures.name: Crude Oil Extractor
structures.function: Placeable production site: Crude Oil x1 per workload cycle. SAN -0.15/target while working.

structures.name: Advanced Sphere Assembly Line
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Advanced Weapon Assembly Line
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Advanced Workshop
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Ancient Furnace
structures.function: It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Cooling suitability.

worker_req.min_level_note: 6+ со слов игрока (PRELIMINARY); paldb пишет 'high-level' без цифры

structures.name: Ancient Workbench
structures.function: accessory, ammo, armor, consumable, other, sphere, technology, weapon

structures.name: Crusher
structures.function: Requires Pal with the Watering trait to spin the water turbine.

structures.name: Electric Furnace
structures.function: It requires electricity to use, but is quicker to process.

structures.name: Gigantic Furnace
structures.function: By growing in size, multiple Pals can collaborate to perform smelting.

structures.name: Gold Coin Assembly Line
structures.function: Warning: building this facility may draw severe scrutiny from the PIDF.

structures.name: High Quality Workbench
structures.function: accessory, ammo, armor, consumable, key_item, material, technology, weapon

structures.name: Improved Furnace
structures.function: The quality has improved, but the processing speed is still unsatisfactory.

structures.name: Pal Gear Workbench
structures.function: Make a saddle to ride Pals, or make a gun for Pals to use.

structures.name: Primitive Furnace
structures.function: The quality leaves much to desire, and processing is slow.

structures.name: Primitive Workbench
structures.function: Requires a Pal that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Production Assembly Line
structures.function: accessory, ammo, armor, key_item, material, technology, weapon

structures.name: Production Assembly Line II
structures.function: ammo, armor, consumable, key_item, material, technology, weapon

structures.name: Sphere Assembly Line
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Sphere Assembly Line II
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Sphere Workbench
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Weapon Assembly Line
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Weapon Assembly Line II
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Weapon Workbench
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Mine
structures.function: Trap that explodes when a Pal steps on it. It deals damage to a wide area.
structures.category_note: defensive trap (не добыча!); Electric/Ice версии повышают шанс поимки наступившего пала

structures.name: Electric Mine
structures.function: Trap that electrocutes the Pal that steps on it. The electrocuted Pal has a higher capture rate with the sphere.
structures.category_note: defensive trap (не добыча!); Electric/Ice версии повышают шанс поимки наступившего пала

structures.name: Coal Mine
structures.function: Produces Coal x1 per workload cycle. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Ice Mine
structures.function: Trap that freezes the Pal that steps on it. The frozen Pal has a higher capture rate with the sphere.
structures.category_note: defensive trap (не добыча!); Electric/Ice версии повышают шанс поимки наступившего пала

structures.name: Sulfur Mine
structures.function: Produces Sulfur x1 per workload cycle. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Pure Quartz Quarry
structures.function: Produces Pure Quartz x1 per workload cycle. (document.getElementById("consent-box").style.display = window["__tcfapi"]

structures.name: Hexolite Quartz Mine
structures.function: Produces Hexolite Quartz x1 per workload cycle. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Soralite Quarry
structures.function: Produces Soralite x1 per workload cycle. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Ore Mining Site II
structures.function: Produces Ore x1 per workload cycle. is hard work that requires physical endurance.

structures.name: Logging Site II
structures.function: Produces Hardwood x1 per workload cycle. Cutting wood is hard work that requires much physical endurance.

structures.name: High-Pressure Crude Oil Extractor
structures.function: Produces Crude Oil x1 per workload cycle. It requires a far greater supply of electricity than the

structures.name: WoodCreator
structures.function: (document.getElementById("consent-box").style.display = window["__tcfapi"]

structures.name: Repair Bench
structures.function: (document.getElementById("consent-box").style.display = window["__tcfapi"]

structures.name: Pal Dressing Facility
structures.function: Skins obtained inside and outside the game can be applied here!

structures.name: Guild Chest
structures.function: The items inside are shared across all bases where it is placed.

structures.name: Dimensional Pal Storage
structures.function: If you set it to private, it can serve as your personal Pal storage.

structures.name: Global Palbox
structures.function: The stored genetic data can also be transferred to other worlds.

structures.name: Fishing Pond
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Large Fishing Pond
structures.function: Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Summoning Altar
structures.function: Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

structures.name: Item Retrieval Machine
structures.function: A device that lets you freely access items from all chests in the base.

structures.name: Pal Surgery Table
structures.function: A facility where surgery can be performed on Pals to change their gender or passive skills.

structures.name: Pal Disassembly Conveyor
structures.function: A dream-like facility that automatically butchers any Pal that is placed inside.

structures.name: Ancient Relic Recycler
structures.function: A highly specialized facility designed for the efficient use of relics without waste.

structures.name: Ancient Material Synthesizer
structures.function: Due to its complex structure, only one Pal can be assigned to it.

structures.name: Beta Wave Generator
structures.function: Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Refrigerated Crusher
structures.function: Requires a power supply and a Pal with Cooling suitability, but it's very efficient.

structures.name: Witch Cauldron
structures.function: Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Water Fountain
structures.function: Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Silo
structures.function: Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Flower Bed
structures.function: Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Wooden Chest
structures.function: It's probably not the best thing to store valuables in.

structures.name: Metal Chest
structures.function: The increased size allows for the storage of more things.

structures.name: Refined Metal Chest
structures.function: It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

structures.name: Advanced Chest
structures.function: It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

structures.name: Shoddy Bed
structures.function: You won't be able to sleep soundly without a roof over your head.

structures.name: Fine Bed
structures.function: You won't be able to sleep soundly without a roof over your head.

structures.name: Ancient Turret
structures.function: However, despite its immense power, it requires a massive amount of electricity to operate.

structures.name: Ancient Air Conditioner
structures.function: (document.getElementById("consent-box").style.display = window["__tcfapi"]

structures.name: Palbox Control Device
structures.function: Set it up wherever you'd like and build a base of your own design.

structures.name: Drafting Table
structures.function: A facility that lets you combine multiple schematics to create more advanced ones.

foods.name: Farmer's Special Dish
foods.notes: A home-cooked meal from a doting farmer. It gives off an absolutely mouthwatering aroma.

foods.name: Flour
foods.notes: Flour made from grinding Wheat . It can be used as an ingredient in making Bread .

foods.name: Wheat
foods.notes: An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes. Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

foods.name: Onion
foods.notes: A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. Not suitable for eating raw.

foods.name: Carrot
foods.notes: A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable. Not suitable for raw consumption.

foods.name: Honey
foods.notes: Honey harvested from Beegarde . It's sweet and tasty.

foods.name: Potato
foods.notes: A hardy and filling crop that grows in any terrain. Not suitable for raw consumption.

foods.name: Milk
foods.notes: Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from Mozzarina .

foods.name: Mushroom
foods.notes: A mushroom that can be eaten raw. They can be found anywhere on the island.

foods.name: Lettuce
foods.notes: A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must. It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

foods.name: Red Berries
foods.notes: A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.

foods.name: Tomato
foods.notes: A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish. Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

foods.name: Egg
foods.notes: Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals. Chikipi produce them.

foods.name: Hot Milk
foods.notes: Even more delicious when warmed up. Great for keeping hunger away.

foods.name: Baked Mushroom
foods.notes: Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value. Curiously, it's also quite filling.

foods.name: Raw Meat
foods.notes: Pal meat. It’s so fresh that even a human could safely eat it raw.

foods.name: Baked Berries
foods.notes: Cooking enhances their nutritional value, and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

foods.name: Fried Egg
foods.notes: An Egg now fried and even more delicious. Great for keeping hunger away.

foods.name: Bread
foods.notes: Bread made from baked Flour . A tasty staple food.

foods.name: French Fries
foods.notes: A dish made by deep-frying Potato . Once you start eating, you can't stop. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

foods.name: Corn
foods.notes: en Text

foods.name: Grape
foods.notes: Grape

foods.name: Pancake
foods.notes: A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking. Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

foods.name: Grilled Meat
foods.notes: Grilled meat. A full stomach leads to smiling faces.

foods.name: Pumpkin
foods.notes: en Text

foods.name: Jam-Filled Bun
foods.notes: Bread with jam spread on it. The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

foods.name: Mushroom Soup
foods.notes: Cream soup made of Mushroom s. Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

foods.name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
foods.notes: A dish made by stir-frying Carrot and Onion . A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

foods.name: Marinated Mushrooms
foods.notes: A dish made by marinating Mushroom s in a marinade. Eating it improves Defense by +10% for a period of time.

foods.name: Omelet
foods.notes: A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup. Eating it improves Attack by +10% for a period of time.

foods.name: Grilled Fish
foods.notes: Grilled Fish

foods.name: Salad
foods.notes: A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato . Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

foods.name: Potage
foods.notes: Potage

foods.name: Seafood Salad
foods.notes: A healthy salad made with Gloopie Tentacle and Lettuce . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

foods.name: Corn Soup
foods.notes: Corn Soup

foods.name: Sandwich
foods.notes: Sandwich

foods.name: Seafood Soup
foods.notes: Seafood Soup

foods.name: Stew
foods.notes: Stew

foods.name: Hot Dog
foods.notes: A culinary dinner sandwiching a sausage in an Bread . Consumption leads to an improved sense of fullness for a specific period.

foods.name: Gratin
foods.notes: A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection. Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

foods.name: Spring Rolls
foods.notes: A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them. The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

foods.name: Carbonara
foods.notes: A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk . Eating it makes it improves Defense by +20% for a period of time.

foods.name: Minestrone
foods.notes: A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables. Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

foods.name: Mushroom Quiche
foods.notes: A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream. It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

foods.name: Pizza
foods.notes: A dish made by piling Red Berries , Tomato and cheese on Bread . Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

foods.name: Seafood Pasta
foods.notes: Fresh pasta is tossed with fragrant seafood in this exceptional dish, using Gloopie tentacles to elevate it even further. When eaten, it nullifies damage from explosions for a certain period of time.

foods.name: Mushroom Stew
foods.notes: A stew made with Mushroom . Consumption elevates work speed and offers Attack +10% for a particular duration.

foods.name: Curry
foods.notes: Curry

foods.name: BLT
foods.notes: A dish where bacon, Lettuce , Tomato are sandwiched in Bread . Consumption increases Attack by +15% for a while.

foods.name: Hamburger
foods.notes: A dish where a hamburger, Lettuce the Tomato are contained in the Bread . When eaten, it boosts one's stomach fullness and Attack by +10% for a while.

foods.name: Cheeseburger
foods.notes: A meal made with a Hamburger with cheese squeezed between it. Upon consumption, it increases the satiety level for a certain period as well as Defense +10%.

foods.name: Cake
foods.notes: A dish eaten during celebrations. Put it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

foods.name: Mushroom Cake
foods.notes: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

foods.name: Vegetable Cake
foods.notes: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Lay eggs twice at once.

foods.name: Extravagant Vegetable Cake
foods.notes: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

foods.name: Special Cake
foods.notes: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

rates.breeding_notes: Breeding Farm: paldb lists 'Real Time 5 Mins' per egg cycle; 1 cake consumed per egg. Babysitter passive: +30% Breeding Speed and Hatching Speed for the assigned pal. Ancient Hatchery (tech 76): fully automated egg production + incubation, ~10s per cycle (guide-reported, preliminary), 10 egg slots, boosts inheritance rate of rare skills, does NOT raise Mutated Egg chance.

cakes_breeding.Cake: baseline; required for any breeding, no bonus
cakes_breeding.Vegetable Cake: pair lays two eggs at once
cakes_breeding.Extravagant Vegetable Cake: mutation more likely + talents grow faster (sometimes miscalled 'Deluxe Vegetable Cake' in EA-era guides)
cakes_breeding.Special Cake: more likely to inherit multiple passive skills from parents

plantation_cycles.cycle_notes: takes time to harvest (paldb); exact base yield and cycle seconds undocumented
takes time to harvest (paldb); exact base yield and cycle seconds undocumented
takes time to harvest (paldb); exact base yield and cycle seconds undocumented
takes time to harvest (paldb); exact base yield and cycle seconds undocumented
takes time to harvest (paldb); exact base yield and cycle seconds undocumented

Cycle: Planting -> growth timer -> Watering -> harvest via Gathering; harvest quantity scales with the gatherer's DropNumRate (x1 at Gathering Lv1 ... x5.5 at Lv10). Research Lab: Plantation Crop Growth Rate +5%/+10%, Plantation Harvest Yield +10%.

rates.ranch_drop_interval_notes: No fixed interval: ranch drops are per-pal partner-skill procs tied to the work animation; higher work speed = more procs. 4-star condensation drastically increases drop quantity. 1.0 caveat (guide-reported): Farming suitability level 5+ can bug ranch-pal AI, so producers are often kept at effective Farming <=4.
rates.work_suitability_speed: Suitability level 1-10 maps to a work-speed value per suitability (see work_speed_by_level; paldb per-suitability pages). Most crafting-type jobs (Kindling, Handiwork, Medicine, Cooling): 50/80/140/240/400/680/1100/1900/3200/5400. Field jobs (Planting, Watering, Lumbering, Mining, Gathering): 50/70/100/140/190/260/370/510/720/1000; Gathering also multiplies harvest drops (DropNumRate x1 at Lv1 to x5.5 at Lv10); Lumbering/Mining apply a DamageRate multiplier; Transporting value = carry capacity (pieces); Farming 12..30; Generating Electricity 250..4000.
rates.work_suitability_boosts: Base paldex levels cap at 8; effective levels 9-10 come from stacking: (1) Applied <Task> Handbook I items: +1 to that suitability, permanent, per individual pal (pal must already have the suitability); (2) Pal Essence Condenser: each star rank raises one existing suitability +1, max rank raises all; (3) partner-skill auras: certain pals give base-wide +1 to one job for all other base pals (12 such auras in 1.0, do not stack); (4) passives, e.g. Farmhand +1 / Ranch Master +2 Farming. Pal Labor Research Lab research grants %-bonuses (work speed +5/10%, plantation growth +5/10%, harvest yield +10%), not suitability levels.
rates.hunger_drain_notes: Per-species hunger stats on paldb: FoodAmount (appetite 1-10, see pal_food_amount) and FullStomachDecreaseRate (multiplier, 1 = default; see pal_hunger_rate_multiplier_nondefault). Absolute satiety/sec baseline undocumented. Passives: Diet Lover -15% hunger rate, Dainty Eater -10%, Mastery of Fasting -20%, Glutton +10%, Bottomless Stomach +15%. World setting PalStomachDecreaceRate (default 1.0) scales all pal hunger. SAN: Workaholic -15% SAN drain; Hot Spring restores SAN (base rate 0.5), higher tiers restore more; Ancient Hot Spring also restores HP.

notes: Pal appetite ('Food' icons on paldb) = FoodAmount stat; 1.0 scale is 1-10 (observed values 1-9 across all 299 pals).
FullStomachDecreaseRate is 1.0 for every pal in the 1.0 data — species hunger differences come from FoodAmount alone.

All five cakes are breeding cakes: placed in the Breeding Farm chest (paldb 1.0 item descriptions confirm each effect, see rates.cakes_breeding). Nutrition/SAN: Cake 656/82, Mushroom 676/84, Vegetable 696/87, Extravagant Vegetable 717/90, Special 738/92.
'Deluxe Vegetable Cake' in EA-era guides = 'Extravagant Vegetable Cake' (canonical 1.0 name; no Deluxe cake exists).

Cake CAN be eaten by hungry pals if placed in the Feed Box (EA-era report, unverified for 1.0); cake in the Breeding Farm chest is not eaten by base pals and reportedly does not spoil there (EA-era, unverified for 1.0). Feed Box eating order: left-to-right slots; Feed Box has an allowed-items filter (EA-era Steam reports, unverified for 1.0).

power=true means the structure consumes electricity; energy_per_sec is paldb's consumption figure. Generators produce power scaled by the worker's Generating Electricity level (250 at Lv1 to 4000 at Lv10); Electric Pylon boosts generation speed (only one counts); Accumulator stores excess.
Egg temperature-comfort mechanic still present in 1.0: eggs hatch faster at their preferred temperature; electric incubators auto-regulate it.
High Quality (tech 28) and Ancient (tech 71) Monitoring Stands reduce SAN drain of working pals; Clinic/Ancient Clinic (Medicine Production worker) reduce SAN depletion and prevent illness.
Hot Spring SAN restore rate 0.5 (base tier); High Quality restores more; Ancient Hot Spring restores the most SAN and also heals HP.

DISCREPANCY: expeditions.json lists Pal Expedition Station at tech 15 (Wood 20, Stone 20, Paldium Fragment 5); paldb 1.0 page shows tech 22 (Wooden Board 10, Stone 100, Paldium Fragment 20). This file follows paldb.
In 1.0 there is no plain 'Pal Bed': tiers are Straw Pal Bed (3) -> Fluffy Pal Bed (24) -> Large Pal Bed (36) -> Pal Pod (56) -> Ancient Pal Bed (73).

2026-07-15: добавлены placeable-добывающие станции (Stone Pit, Ore Mining Site tech 24, Logging Site, Crude Oil Extractor) — изначальный сбор их пропустил. Placeable-шахт для Coal/Sulfur/Quartz/Paldium в 1.0 НЕТ (paldb: у этих ресурсов нет производящей постройки) — только точки на карте.
2026-07-15: добавлены 22 крафт-станции (печи, верстаки, сборочные линии) со страниц paldb — изначальный сбор покрывал только Pal/Food категории.
2026-07-15: function-описания дозаполнены у станций, добавленных 07-15; worker_req распарсен из описаний локально.

2026-07-15: +40 функциональных зданий со Structures-индекса paldb (все шахты Lumbering/Mining категории, сундуки, пруды, алтарь, ресайклеры). Прежняя заметка 'шахт для Coal/Sulfur/Quartz нет' была ошибкой поиска по слагам — опровергнута.
gaps: Per-crop plantation yield_per_harvest and absolute growth-cycle seconds are undocumented in fetched sources (yield scales with gatherer DropNumRate; see plantation_cycles).
Absolute baseline hunger (satiety/sec) and SAN drain/sec are undocumented; only relative multipliers known.
Ancient Hatchery ~10s cycle and near-instant incubation are guide-reported (preliminary), not confirmed on paldb.
Palbox exact base-pal capacity and Feed Box slot count are not listed on their paldb pages.
Incubator hatch-speed multipliers (Electric ~1.5x is EA-era) and per-egg-size base hatch times unknown.
Farmer's Special Dish has no Nutrition/SAN listed on paldb.
Whether Applied <Task> Handbook tiers II+ exist is unconfirmed (only tier I pages found).
Feed Box eating order / cake-in-feed-box behavior not yet re-verified for 1.0 (EA-era sources).

sources.what: 58 structure pages: tech level, ancient-tech flag, build materials, energy use, worker slots, function text (e.g. /en/Breeding_Farm, /en/Ancient_Hatchery)
56 food item pages: Nutrition, SAN, spoil timer (Corruption), work-speed buffs, cake breeding effects
299 pal pages: FoodAmount (appetite) and FullStomachDecreaseRate stats
12 work-suitability pages: exact work-speed value per level 1-10, DropNumRate/DamageRate multipliers, Research Lab effect lists
handbook item text: permanent +1 suitability per pal
1.0 suitability boosts: condensation +1/star, partner-skill base-wide auras
1.0 breeding: 1 cake = 1 egg, Ancient Hatchery automation/batching, cake effects
1.0 SAN drain/recovery, hot spring rate 0.5, Depressed status
hunger/SAN passives: Diet Lover -15%, Dainty Eater -10%, Mastery of Fasting -20%, Glutton +10%, Bottomless Stomach +15%, Workaholic -15% SAN
plantation workflow and gathering-level yield scaling (EA-era, unverified for 1.0)
Feed Box eating order left-to-right, allowed-items filter (EA-era)
1.0 ranch drop mechanics, 4-star condensation drop boost, Farming Lv5+ ranch AI bug
